title: Matthiola ramuliflora
taxonomy: Matthiola ramuliflora is classified within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This classification places it alongside other flowering plants such as cabbages, broccoli, and mustard. Matthiola ramuliflora is further classified within the genus Matthiola, a group of annual and perennial plants native to the Mediterranean region. The genus Matthiola is characterized by its fragrant flowers and ability to thrive in dry conditions. Matthiola ramuliflora's classification reflects its unique combination of characteristics and adaptations to its native environment.
